summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Booking Detail with RBAC permissions (Budeživo.cz). All backend APIs passed (100% - 11/11 tests). Frontend modal displays all required sections correctly. Role-based access control working - admin can edit all, attendance tracking functional, lecturer self-assignment working.

minor.issue: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent

issues: Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby for screen readers (console warning)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns user with role
Backend: PUT /api/bookings/{id} - update status
Backend: PUT /api/bookings/{id} - update actual attendance
Backend: PUT /api/bookings/{id} - update notes
Backend: PUT /api/bookings/{id} - 404 for non-existent booking
Backend: POST /api/bookings/{id}/assign-lecturer - self assign
Backend: POST /api/bookings/{id}/assign-lecturer - rejects double assignment
Backend: DELETE /api/bookings/{id}/unassign-lecturer
Backend: Booking creation with num_teachers field
Backend: Demo account login (demo@budezivo.cz / demo123)
Frontend: Login with demo account
Frontend: Bookings page loads with role badge (Role: admin)
Frontend: Booking detail modal opens with all sections
Frontend: Škola / Skupina section displays
Frontend: Datum a čas section displays
Frontend: Počet účastníků - shows num_students and num_teachers (Rezervováno pedagogů)
Frontend: Skutečná účast edit form (actual_students, actual_teachers inputs)
Frontend: Edit attendance button visible for admin role
Frontend: Save attendance updates booking
Frontend: Kontaktní údaje section with email and phone links
Frontend: Přiřazený lektor section
Frontend: Assign lecturer button - self assign working
Frontend: Unassign lecturer button visible for assigned lecturer
Frontend: Status badges (Potvrzeno, Čeká na potvrzení)
Frontend: Confirm/Cancel buttons on pending booking cards
Frontend: Booking card shows actual vs reserved count (20 (z 18))
action_items: Consider adding aria-describedby to DialogContent for accessibility compliance
critical_code_review_comments: All RBAC permissions implemented correctly - admin/spravce/edukator can edit all, pokladni can edit attendance only, lektor can self-assign
num_teachers field properly added to BookingBase model and displayed in UI
Contact details (email, phone) displayed with clickable mailto:/tel: links
Actual attendance tracking working with edit mode toggle
Lecturer assignment with timestamp tracking implemented correctly
seed_data_creation: Demo account created: demo@budezivo.cz / demo123. Test bookings created for MŠ Sluníčko and ZŠ Karlova.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Booking detail modal fully tested. Backend RBAC endpoints working. Demo credentials: demo@budezivo.cz / demo123 (admin role). Two test bookings exist: MŠ Sluníčko (confirmed, with actual attendance 20/2) and ZŠ Karlova (pending). Lecturer demo@budezivo.cz assigned to bookings. All data-testid attributes present for automated testing.
